headline: Wells Fargo Says These 2 Beaten-Down Cybersecurity Stocks Could Rebound to $200
summary: Generative and agentic AI tech has proven to be a headwind for software stocks, and cybersecurity names have been affected too. That impact got more pronounced recently. The negative catalyst here was Anthropic’s release of Claude Code Security, a new tool in the Claude AI model. It allows the AI to scan codebases – and also to tag vulnerabilities and inform the human users of potential patches. Cybersecurity stocks dropped sharply on the new tool’s release, based on the theory of ‘unload stocks

headline: Cylake Launches to Bring Complete, AI-Native, Data-Driven Cybersecurity to Customers that Require Total Data Sovereignty
summary: Founded by a team of seasoned security leaders, Cylake debuts with $45M in seed financing, led by Greylock PartnersSUNNYVALE, Calif., March 05, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Cylake today announced its launch as a new cybersecurity company bringing complete, AI-native, data-driven protection to customers in a fully sovereign way—no public cloud required.
